name: Smoky Salmon
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and flake the salmon.
2. Combine the salmon, lemon juice, onion, horseradish, liquid smoke, salt, and pepper with the cream cheese. Blend together well.
3. Shape the mixture into a ball or log on wax paper.
4. Wrap and chill for several hours.
5. Roll the salmon mold on the chopped pecans and snipped parsley.
6. Chill. If desired, just before serving, shape into fish shape and garnish with additional parsley.
